query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'projects' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%contractor%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%company%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%builder%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%epc%' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'projects' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%contractor%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%company%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%builder%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%epc%' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE	COLUMN_TYPE
companyAId	int	int
companyName	varchar	varchar(256)
companyAName	varchar	varchar(256)
companyWebsite	varchar	varchar(512)
companyARoleInPairing	varchar	varchar(64)
companyBId	int	int
company	varchar	varchar(256)
companyBName	varchar	varchar(256)
companyBRoleInPairing	varchar	varchar(64)
contractors	json	json
